optionsDescription: Generate UUID v6 values with sortable timestamps, private random node IDs, or explicit v1-compatible fields.
customNodeDescription: Use 12 hex digits, colon-separated, hyphen-separated, or dotted notation.
timestampOutOfRange: Timestamp must be between {min} and {max} Unix milliseconds.
clockSequenceInvalid: Clock sequence must be an integer from 0 to {max}.
resultsDescription: UUIDs are generated in-browser and ordered by their embedded timestamp.
